name: Indoor Tee - Kearney
about: Indoor Tee - Kearney is a golf simulator venue utilizing Trackman iO technology for precise swing and ball flight analysis. The facility offers various booking options, including hourly sessions, multi-hour packages, and monthly memberships, catering to different play styles and budgets. Patrons can play on virtual replicas of prestigious golf courses like PGA National and St. Andrews, with access to detailed performance metrics including club speed, ball speed, and launch angle. The venue also hosts special offers, group events, and gift card sales to enhance the customer experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman iO dual-radar technology provides highly accurate swing and ball flight data
Access to world-class golf courses like St. Andrews and PGA National in a climate-controlled environment
Flexible pricing options including memberships, hourly packages, and special offers for regular play
Ability to play year-round regardless of weather conditions
Family-friendly atmosphere with options for group bookings and events

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on the website
No alcohol service mentioned on the website

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual-radar technology providing detailed swing and ball flight data
